messages.content: What is the capital of France?
The capital of France is Paris.
How do I reset my password?
To reset your password, click on the 'Forgot password' link on the login page and follow the instructions sent to your email.
Our support team is available Monday to Friday, 9 AM to 6 PM UTC.
How do I cancel my subscription?
You can cancel your subscription at any time from the Account Settings page under Billing.
Yes, all data is encrypted at rest and in transit using industry-standard AES-256 and TLS 1.3.
